channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitical news headlines curated from Tier 1 and Tier 2 sources

item.title: 🇰🇵 North Korea declares it is not bound by nuclear non-proliferation treaty
item.description: Pyongyang says the US and other countries are "tarnishing the atmosphere" at the UN NPT review conference by raising concerns about its nuclear weapons program.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah elite Radwan Force commander killed in Israeli strike on Beirut
item.description: An Israeli airstrike on Beirut southern suburbs killed a senior commander from Hezbollah elite Radwan Force, according to local reports.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia cancels Victory Day celebrations in Crimea over Ukraine drone threat
item.description: Russian occupation authorities in Crimea cancelled May 9 Victory Day events citing security concerns amid Ukrainian drone strikes targeting the peninsula.

item.title: 🇸🇾 Israeli forces launch new incursion into Syrias Daraa province
item.description: Israeli forces carried out an incursion in the Yarmouk Basin region in western Daraa countryside late Wednesday, marking continued Israeli operations in southern Syria.

item.title: ⚔️ Russias YJ-20 hypersonic missile threatens US carrier dominance
item.description: SCMP analyzes Chinas YJ-20 hypersonic sea-based missile, a highly maneuverable weapon that could sink aircraft carriers with a single hit and is nearly impossible to intercept.

item.title: 🇮🇷 US-Iran move toward deal framework after Trump halts Hormuz operation
item.description: Al-Monitor reports that Washington and Tehran are moving toward a framework agreement after President Trump suspended a planned military operation to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Exhaustion and sadness in Beiruts southern suburbs after strikes
item.description: Residents of Beiruts southern suburbs describe exhaustion and sadness following Israeli strikes targeting Hezbollah positions in the area.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Chinas role in enabling Irans Shahed drone supply lines
item.description: Nikkei Asia examines how China has facilitated Irans drone program through component sales and technical support, enabling Shahed drone production.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia starts buying forex as Middle East war oil windfall arrives
item.description: Russia is purchasing foreign currency for the first time since late 2024 as soaring oil prices from Middle East tensions boost its export revenues.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE tells Iran that its ties and defense partnerships are sovereign matter
item.description: The UAE has conveyed to Iran that its defense relationships with the US and other partners are a sovereign decision, amid regional tensions over the Iran conflict.

item.title: ⚠️ Russia warns diplomatic missions to evacuate staff from Kyiv
item.description: Russia warned foreign diplomatic missions to evacuate staff from Kyiv ahead of May 9 Victory Day celebrations, suggesting Moscow may be planning significant strikes.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan fires missile in joint drill with US allies in northern Philippines
item.description: Japan conducted a missile exercise with US allies in the northern Philippines, facing south toward potential regional flashpoints in a show of force.

item.title: 🏭 G7 trade ministers discuss critical minerals supply chain
item.description: G7 trade ministers are discussing critical minerals supply chain security amid concerns over Chinese dominance in rare earth processing.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Strike hits Beiruts southern suburbs for first time in weeks
item.description: A strike hit Beiruts southern suburbs for the first time in weeks, sources said, as regional tensions continue over the Iran-Israel conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Chinese foreign minister kicks off meeting with Iranian counterpart
item.description: Chinas foreign minister Wang Yi began meetings with his Iranian counterpart as Beijing seeks to play a role in de-escalating regional tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine says Russia violated ceasefire initiated by Kyiv
item.description: Ukraine accused Russia of violating a unilateral ceasefire that Kyiv had initiated, as Moscow continued drone and missile attacks.

item.title: 📺 CNN founder Ted Turner dies at 87
item.description: CNN founder Ted Turner has died at age 87. Turner revolutionized television news with the launch of the 24-hour news network in 1980.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK advises two returnees from hantavirus-hit cruise ship to self-isolate
item.description: British health authorities advised two passengers returning from a cruise ship hit by a hantavirus outbreak to self-isolate as a precaution.

item.title: 🇦🇺 Australia to lift minimum fuel stockpiles by around 10 days
item.description: Australia will increase its minimum fuel stockpiles by about 10 days to improve energy security amid global supply chain concerns.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran says it wants comprehensive agreement with US
item.description: Iran stated it wants a comprehensive agreement with the United States, as diplomatic efforts continue to resolve the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🚢 Cruise ship hit by hantavirus outbreak departs Cape Verde for Canary Islands
item.description: A cruise ship affected by a hantavirus outbreak has departed Cape Verde for the Canary Islands as health authorities monitor the situation.

item.title: ⛪ Top Vatican cardinal calls Trumps attacks on Pope Leo strange
item.description: A senior Vatican cardinal described President Trumps attacks on Pope Leo as strange, amid ongoing tensions between the US administration and the Catholic Church.

item.title: 🚢 French aircraft carrier group moving into Red Sea and Gulf of Aden
item.description: A French aircraft carrier battle group is moving into the Red Sea and Gulf of Aden as Western powers increase naval presence near Iran.

item.title: 💶 Euro zone services activity slumps in April with weak demand
item.description: Euro zone services activity slumped in April amid weak demand, PMI data showed, as the Iran conflict continues to weigh on European economies.

item.title: 🏦 Germany considers last-ditch plan to thwart Italian bid for Commerzbank
item.description: Germany is considering a last-ditch plan to thwart Italys UniCredit from acquiring Commerzbank, reflecting growing economic nationalism in Europe.
